description.content: Operations for listing and retrieving artifacts produced by pipeline runs including compiled outputs, test results, and published files.

Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific pipeline run. Artifacts include compiled binaries, test results, container images, or any files published using the PublishPipelineArtifact task during pipeline execution.

REST API for managing pipelines and pipeline runs in Azure DevOps. Provides programmatic access to create, list, and retrieve YAML-based CI/CD pipeline definitions, trigger and monitor pipeline runs with custom variables and parameters, access pipeline run logs for debugging and auditing, and retrieve artifacts produced by pipeline runs.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure DevOps
